name: ai-driven-qa-framework
description: AI-driven QA framework starter (Playwright + TypeScript) — POM + single ActionKeyword layer, qa-agent AI skill, 4 read-first MCP servers, regression + bug HTML/DOCX report generators, Jira-bug auto-reporter, sample CI pipelines (Jenkins/GitHub Actions/GitLab CI). Drop into any web project.

scripts.test:dev: npx cross-env test_env=dev playwright test -c config/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:dev:refresh: npx cross-env test_env=dev refresh=yes playwright test -c config/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:test: npx cross-env test_env=test playwright test -c config/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:test:refresh: npx cross-env test_env=test refresh=yes playwright test -c config/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:prod: npx cross-env test_env=prod playwright test -c config/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:api: npx cross-env test_env=test SKIP_WEB_AUTH=1 playwright test -c config/playwright.config.ts --project=api
scripts.test:grpc: npx cross-env test_env=test SKIP_WEB_AUTH=1 playwright test -c config/playwright.config.ts --project=grpc
scripts.test:mobile:web: npx cross-env test_env=test playwright test -c config/playwright.config.ts --project=mobile-web-android --project=mobile-web-ios
scripts.test:mobile:native: npx cross-env test_env=test ALLOW_MOBILE_NATIVE=1 playwright test -c config/playwright.config.ts --project=mobile-native
scripts.proto:gen: node -e "console.log('Optional typed stubs: install buf + ts-proto, then generate from grpc/proto. See grpc/README.md')"
scripts.report:all: yarn aiqa:collect && yarn aiqa:diagnose && yarn aiqa:finalize && yarn aiqa:report:html && yarn report:bugs
scripts.allure:report: allure generate test-output/allure-results --clean -o test-output/allure-report && allure open test-output/allure-report
